concept: ** This relaxing yet challenging puzzle game combines wood block mechanics with a Sudoku grid, tasking players to place various wooden block shapes onto a 9x9 board. The objective is to clear blocks by completely filling any row, column, or 3x3 square, earning points for each cleared line or square. The game ends when no more available block shapes can be placed on the grid, with players striving to achieve and beat their highest score. Progression is endless, driven by daily puzzles and hundreds of new wood block puzzles released weekly, encouraging continuous brain training. Monetization, typical for free puzzle games, likely involves in-app purchases for ad removal, hint packs, or cosmetic themes, alongside rewarded video advertisements.
name: Woodoku - Wood Block Puzzles
